_meta._divergence: langgraph-python streams 7 progressive set_steps calls chained by toolCallId; Strands mints its own UUID tool_call_ids per tool result, so that chain cannot survive a follow-up turn — it breaks, the bare-userMessage fixture re-fires, and the run loops until it crashes (leaving the previous pill's state on screen → the probe's 'duplicates an earlier pill' failure). The 3 pills also run in ONE thread, so hasToolResult is thread-global and unusable. This integration emits ONE set_steps call per pill (full, already-completed list) gated sequenceIndex:0 (per-pill userMessage counter, id- and thread-history-invariant; same pattern built-in-agent uses for its Responses-API non-deterministic ids), plus a bare-userMessage text conclusion. set_steps uses stateFromArgs so the card paints when the call fires; the d5 probe asserts >= 2 distinct step rows per pill, which this satisfies without the fragile id chain.

fixtures._comment: gen-ui-agent 'Plan a product launch' — 1st leg: single set_steps with the full completed launch plan. sequenceIndex:0 gates it to the first match of this pill's userMessage; the bare-userMessage conclusion below catches the post-tool follow-up. Distinct step titles fingerprint this pill apart from offsite/competitor.

toolCalls.name: set_steps
toolCalls.arguments: {"steps":[{"id":"launch-1","title":"Define launch goals and audience","status":"completed"},{"id":"launch-2","title":"Coordinate marketing and PR rollout","status":"completed"},{"id":"launch-3","title":"Track post-launch metrics for week 1","status":"completed"}]}

fixtures._comment: gen-ui-agent 'Plan a product launch' — 2nd leg: text conclusion after set_steps ran (sequenceIndex:0 exhausted).

response.content: All three launch steps complete. Goals defined, marketing aligned, post-launch metrics tracked — ready to ship.

toolCalls.name: set_steps
toolCalls.arguments: {"steps":[{"id":"offsite-1","title":"Reserve venue near downtown for 30 engineers","status":"completed"},{"id":"offsite-2","title":"Build day-by-day agenda with workshop slots","status":"completed"},{"id":"offsite-3","title":"Arrange travel, lodging and group meals","status":"completed"}]}

response.content: Offsite locked in. Venue booked, agenda set, travel and meals arranged.

toolCalls.name: set_steps
toolCalls.arguments: {"steps":[{"id":"comp-1","title":"Map competitor product surface and pricing tiers","status":"completed"},{"id":"comp-2","title":"Summarize their public differentiation themes","status":"completed"},{"id":"comp-3","title":"Identify weaknesses our positioning can exploit","status":"completed"}]}

response.content: Competitor brief assembled. Surface mapped, themes summarized, exploitable weaknesses identified.
